---
title: "Indicadores de Desarrollo"
author: "Gapminder Analytics Group"
runtime: shiny
format: html
---

```{r}
library(shiny)
library(plotly)

# Datos de ejemplo
df <- data.frame(
  year = rep(2000:2010, 5),
  continent = rep(c("Asia","Europe","Africa","Americas","Oceania"), each=11),
  lifeExp = runif(55, 40, 80)
)

ui <- fluidPage(
  titlePanel("Life Expectancy Dashboard"),
  sidebarLayout(
    sidebarPanel(
      selectInput("continent", "Selecciona continente:",
                  choices = unique(df$continent))
    ),
    mainPanel(
      plotlyOutput("plot")
    )
  )
)

server <- function(input, output) {
  output$plot <- renderPlotly({
    d <- subset(df, continent == input$continent)
    plot_ly(d, x = ~year, y = ~lifeExp, type = 'scatter', mode = 'lines+markers')
  })
}

shinyApp(ui, server)

```
